title: MTR London Underground Trains
description: MTR London Underground Trains expansion for the Minecraft Transit Railway mod.
body:
![LU Trains Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/97a7007340e54400b1bfa26adb0ccc44e88f58e2.png)

## About
The MTR London Underground Trains Addon gives you LU trains to use for your own London Underground line using the Minecraft Transit Railway Mod (MTR). There will be more LU Trains coming soon!

## For Users Using MTR 3.2.2/4.0.0 Forge 1.16.5, 1.17.1 Or 1.18.2 
Join Discord Server:
[Download Resource Pack Version](https://discord.com/channels/354409854347247646/1351237692079472791) 

Note: The Mod version will soon have more features. 

## Links
About the London Underground Trains Addon:
[MTR London Underground Trains Addon - 1.0.0](https://youtu.be/3xyQUnjKkPk)

Here is a showcase of the 1992 Tube Stock: 
[I Created 1992 Tube Stock For Minecraft](https://youtu.be/M2SBGxYzigE?si=OxYGbYK1EpyLh-sz)

## Agreement 
You're allowed to use the models in any way you want however if it's publicly shown, you need to give proper credit as I worked on the 1992 Stock for 2 years!

### Let's connect
Any feedback, issues, questions or suggestions would be appreciated!  

[![Discord](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/62f176513474a3bf1d9a08d44ea2ec2acdbe3771.png))](https://discord.gg/TWJy8Hpkyx)
